description: Execute a bounded restoration bugfix to correct the relative path resolution error (ENOENT) in the get_dispatch_state MCP tool.
scope: Modify the 'dispatchPath' variable within the 'get_dispatch_state' handler in src/mcp-server/src/index.ts to correctly traverse three directory levels up instead of two. Execute the existing src/mcp-server/src/test-client.ts to collect verification evidence.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO incidental fixes to 'get_iteration_state' or 'get_execution_diff' paths. NO modifications to 'src/mcp-server/src/test-client.ts'. NO new tool capabilities or state mutators. NO approval automation, reviewer identity redesign, or workflow schema changes.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files (e.g. test-client.ts).
Attempting to fix paths in get_iteration_state or get_execution_diff.
Attempting to write to any artifact outside allowed_artifacts.
Attempting to implement state mutators or auto-approval logic.
Executing implementation before an explicit, independent contract review decision is provided.
